title: taraxacum ayllonense
intro: Taraxacum ayllonense, a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, is also known as Ayllón's dandelion. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum ayllonense include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum ayllonense include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
